create.title: Add Environment
create.description: Connect to a Docker host or Kubernetes cluster.
create.name: Name
create.agentDescription: A lightweight agent binary runs on the remote machine and connects outbound to McHarbor via WebSocket. No ports need to be opened on the remote host. After creating the environment, you'll receive a token to configure the agent.
create.hostKeyFingerprintHelp: Verify the remote server fingerprint before deploying. Example: ssh-keyscan <host> | ssh-keygen -lf - -E sha256
create.sshPasswordWarning: Password authentication is less secure than key-based authentication. Consider using an SSH key instead.
create.scriptDescription: After creating the environment, you'll receive a one-time install URL. Run it on the remote machine to auto-install the agent. The URL expires after 24 hours.

detail.notFoundDescription: The requested environment could not be found.
detail.title: Environment Details

activity.title: Activity Settings
activity.description: Control live event tracking, container metrics, change highlights, and Docker disk usage alerts for this environment.
activity.trackContainerEventsDescription: Track container events (start, stop, restart, and similar actions) from this environment in real-time.
activity.collectContainerMetricsTitle: Collect CPU and memory usage statistics
activity.collectContainerMetricsDescription: Poll this environment for live container CPU and memory statistics used by dashboards and list views.
activity.highlightContainerChangesTitle: Show amber glow when container values change
activity.highlightContainerChangesDescription: Highlight containers in the containers list when their state or live values change.
activity.diskUsageNotificationsTitle: Send notifications when Docker disk usage exceeds the threshold
activity.diskUsageNotificationsDescription: Send an in-app notification when Docker storage crosses the configured threshold for this environment.
activity.diskCapacityNote: Threshold alerts use the Docker storage driver capacity reported by the engine when it is available.
activity.diskUsageExceededDescription: Docker storage is at {{percent}}% of capacity (threshold: {{threshold}}%, current usage: {{total}}).
activity.kubernetesNote: These activity settings apply to Docker environments. You can still test the connection for this environment.

automation.title: Automation Settings
automation.description: Environment-level defaults for scheduled update checks, image pruning, and timezone handling.
automation.scheduledUpdateCheckDescription: Periodically check all containers in this environment for available image updates.
automation.scheduledUpdateCheckHint: Automatically check for container updates on a schedule
automation.automaticImagePruningDescription: Automatically remove unused Docker images every day at 03:00 in this environment's timezone to free up disk space.
automation.automaticImagePruningHint: Runs daily at 03:00 using the timezone below
automation.timezoneDescription: Used for scheduling auto-updates, git syncs, and image pruning.
automation.kubernetesNote: Update checks and image pruning apply to Docker environments. You can still set the timezone for scheduling.

agentToken.title: Agent Token Created
agentToken.description: Save this token now — it will not be shown again.
agentToken.scriptExpiry: This URL expires after 24 hours and can only be used once.

confirm.removeDescription: This will remove this environment from McHarbor.
